name: COMPSS Protein Metrics
description: Evaluate your protein sequences or structures on a variety of models for likelihood and stability. Structure metrics: ESM-IF, ProteinMPNN, MIF-ST. Sequence metrics: ESM-1v, ESM-1v mask6, CARP-640m.
capabilities: Evaluate your protein sequences or structures on a variety of models for likelihood and stability
Sequence metrics: ESM-1v, ESM-1v mask6, CARP-640m

sequence.description: Protein amino acid sequence for sequence-based metrics (ESM-1v, CARP-640m)

pdb_file.description: Protein structure in PDB format for structure-based metrics (ESM-IF, ProteinMPNN, MIF-ST)

metrics.description: List of scoring models to evaluate. Structure metrics require PDB input; sequence metrics require amino acid sequence.
